prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `c48954c1`.
codex_response:
Implemented `c48954c1` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is a `3x3 -> 9x9` mirror tiling: build the middle band as `vmirror(I) | I | vmirror(I)`, then place its `hmirror` above and below. I used the summary hint as a starting check because it matched the official examples; it was not discarded, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

- Task files: [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c48954c1/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c48954c1/generator.py#L1), [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c48954c1/__init__.py#L1)

- Validation: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task c48954c1` passed `4/4`; `python -m arc2.shared.build --task c48954c1 --n-examples 1000` produced the artifacts; `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task c48954c1` passed `1000/1000`
- Generator fit: it stays in the official family by always producing full `3x3` non-background inputs with 3-4 colors, a repeated dominant color, and non-degenerate rows/columns so the mirrored tiling remains visually on-distribution.
